wallet.title: 🔐 BitVoy Wallet Authentication
wallet.authMessage: A client application has requested authentication. Please complete passkey authentication with your BitVoy wallet to continue.

getStarted.title: 🔐 BitVoy Account Creation
getStarted.message: To complete authentication, you need to create a BitVoy account first. Click the button below to start the account creation process.

pay.insufficientGas: Insufficient {{token}} balance for gas fee. Please add {{token}} to your wallet to pay for transaction fees.
pay.lowGas: Low {{token}} balance. Transaction may fail due to insufficient gas. Please ensure you have enough {{token}} to pay for transaction fees.

walletAlreadyExists.title: Wallet Already Exists
walletAlreadyExists.message:
A wallet has already been created for this device.

If you need to access your existing wallet, please use the "Log In" option instead.

If you want to perform easy recovery, please use the "Easy Recovery" option.

inAppBrowser.detected: In-app browser detected. We recommend viewing in an external browser such as Chrome or Safari.
inAppBrowser.urlCopied: URL copied. Please open in Safari / Chrome.
